title: cola chlamydantha
intro: Cola chlamydantha, also known as Cola nitida, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Cola chlamydantha include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are often used to make a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
